title: The Future of Meat Alternatives
subtitle: 实验室培育的肉类能否拯救地球

paragraphs.en: Cellular agriculture promises to produce real animal protein without raising and slaughtering animals. By cultivating meat from cell cultures in laboratory conditions, companies aim to deliver identical products with drastically reduced environmental impact. This technology has progressed from science fiction to commercial reality within a single decade.
paragraphs.zh: 细胞农业承诺在不饲养和屠宰动物的情况下生产真正的动物蛋白。通过在实验室条件下从细胞培养物中培育肉类，公司旨在提供相同的产品，同时大幅减少环境影响。这项技术在短短十年内已从科幻小说发展为商业现实。

paragraphs.en: The environmental case for cultivated meat is compelling. Traditional livestock production generates approximately fifteen percent of global greenhouse gas emissions while consuming vast land and water resources. Lab-grown alternatives could reduce these impacts by over ninety percent while eliminating animal welfare concerns entirely.
paragraphs.zh: 培育肉的环境论据是令人信服的。传统畜牧业产生约15%的全球温室气体排放，同时消耗大量土地和水资源。实验室培育的替代品可以将这些影响减少90%以上，同时完全消除动物福利问题。

paragraphs.en: Significant technical challenges remain before cultivated meat achieves mass market viability. Current production costs, while declining rapidly, still exceed conventional meat prices substantially. Scaling production to industrial levels requires innovations in bioreactor design and growth medium development.
paragraphs.zh: 在培育肉实现大众市场可行性之前，仍存在重大技术挑战。当前的生产成本虽然在快速下降，但仍大大超过传统肉类价格。将生产规模扩大到工业水平需要在生物反应器设计和生长培养基开发方面进行创新。

paragraphs.en: Consumer acceptance represents another crucial hurdle. Despite identical cellular composition, some people feel instinctive resistance to laboratory-grown food. Successful marketing must overcome the yuck factor while emphasizing familiar qualities of taste, texture, and nutritional value that match or exceed conventional products.
paragraphs.zh: 消费者接受度代表另一个关键障碍。尽管细胞组成相同，但一些人对实验室培育的食品感到本能的抵触。成功的营销必须克服恶心因素，同时强调与传统产品相匹配或超越的味道、质地和营养价值等熟悉的品质。

paragraphs.en: Regulatory frameworks are evolving to accommodate these novel foods. Singapore became the first nation to approve cultivated meat sales, with other countries developing assessment protocols. As technology advances and costs decrease, cultivated meat may transform from luxury novelty to mainstream protein source within the coming decades.
paragraphs.zh: 监管框架正在发展以适应这些新型食品。新加坡成为第一个批准培育肉销售的国家，其他国家正在制定评估协议。随着技术进步和成本下降，培育肉可能在未来几十年内从奢侈新奇事物转变为主流蛋白质来源。
